text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One night, while everyone in the dorm is asleep...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Common ☆ spiderwort! Mirror, mirror, answer my
call.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
My magic's really improving! My times are getting
better, and I learned a whole bunch of new
incantations too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh! You stupid mirror! Just say something
already!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! Are you trying to tell me my magic still isn't
good enough?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Fine! Mirror, mirror, you just watch! I'm not stepping an inch off my path to become a grand witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be a grand witch like Grandma, and
then I'll show you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Listen up! Starting today, we're gonna do the training I wanna do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And that means a bunch of training to build up
the magical energy I need right now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not gonna be doing any other training at
all! Got that, Familiar?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having my own training plans thrown out the
window is tough... but I don't want her enthusiasm
to go to waste. I'll let her be the boss for the time
being!
